Apply ALL of the following 3 fixes to this file:

## EmptyState Migration (apply as ONE coherent change)
The following 2 rules are all part of the EmptyState component family migration.
Apply them together — they describe different aspects of the same restructuring.

### Fix 1
Lines: 12, 13
Rule [sd-cf-emptystate-emptystate-req-wrap]:
Components placed directly inside <EmptyState> must be wrapped in <EmptyStateBody>.

Replace:
  <EmptyState>
    <SomeComponent />
  </EmptyState>

With:
  <EmptyState>
    <EmptyStateBody>
      <SomeComponent />
    </EmptyStateBody>
  </EmptyState>

This rule affects multiple locations in the file. Apply ALL steps together as one logical change.

```
   14        {title}

```

### Fix 2

chunks.response:
The file has been successfully updated with all 3 fixes applied. Here's a summary of all changes made:

1. **Fix 3 (import cleanup)**: Removed `EmptyStateIcon` from the import statement on line 2, since the component is no longer used.

2. **Fix 2 (icon prop migration)**: Removed `<EmptyStateIcon icon={CubesIcon} />` from the JSX body and moved `icon={CubesIcon}` as a prop onto the `<EmptyState>` component itself.

3. **Fix 1 (EmptyStateBody wrapping)**: Wrapped the `<Title>` component (which was directly inside `<EmptyState>`) in an `<EmptyStateBody>` wrapper, as required by the new API.
